title: Coastline
description: Coastline is a collection of mods designed to improve exploration. Craft planes, sail ships, rest in hammocks, and more.
body:
# **Coastline** [ ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/coastline-definitive) [ ](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XgF9kWtx4vHHc97ZJ-4f3KxiPjdav0xz5mKAegNBnS4/edit?usp=sharing) [](https://discord.gg/e5jzkAj9Ms) The ultimate modpack for exploration, made to work seamlessly on the Coastline server. Coastline contains everything you'll need to travel great distances, conquer structures, and build a unique world around you, enjoying a whole new take on the Minecraft experience. ## Requirements This modpack is built for version **1.21.1** and runs best on the latest version of **Java**. To run, it needs a launcher like **Curseforge, Modrinth,** or **Prism.** ## FAQs
What's Coastline? Coastline is a modded server with a wide variety of games, SMPs, and activities to enjoy. We're always happy to welcome new players. To get started, join our Discord, which is linked to this page.
What's included in this modpack? Notable mods include Xaero's Minimap, Small Ships, Immersive Aircraft, and Ewewukek's Musket Mod. This pack also contains a number of performance and shader mods to improve everyone's experience, regardless of system specs.
### Check out our plugins* for Coastline: ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Edition-Coastline_Sunbeam-fcc838?style=plastic&labelColor=%23e7e7e7) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Edition-Coastline_Ace-AC1E23?style=plastic&labelColor=%23e7e7e7) *Different from Minecraft's plugins. Designed to add onto the standard modpack. > **Note:** All resources and third-party material belong to their respective owners. Redistribution may be handled in accordance with the licenses of the original creator. All content used with permission from the initial developer. [](https://ko-fi.com/thrandos)
